sys_hub_trigger_template.name: Asset Request Approval
sys_hub_trigger_template.trigger_values: [{"name":"table","label":"Table","type":"table_name","displayValue":"Asset Request","value":"x_1958814_enterp_0_asset_request","readOnly":false,"extendable":false},{"name":"condition","label":"Condition","type":"conditions","displayValue":"^EQ","value":"^EQ","readOnly":false,"extendable":false},{"name":"run_on_extended","label":"Run On Extended","type":"choice","displayValue":"","value":"false","readOnly":false,"extendable":false},{"name":"run_flow_in","label":"Run Flow In","type":"choice","displayValue":"","value":"any","readOnly":false,"extendable":false},{"name":"run_when_user_list","label":"Run When User List","type":"glide_list","displayValue":"","value":"","readOnly":false,"extendable":false},{"name":"run_when_setting","label":"Run When Setting","type":"choice","displayValue":"","value":"both","readOnly":false,"extendable":false},{"name":"run_when_user_setting","label":"Run When User Setting","type":"choice","displayValue":"","value":"any","readOnly":false,"extendable":false}]
